content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build a high-impact portfolio. Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap with this intermediate guide for AI Founders.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, use Claude Code to rapidly scaffold and deploy specialized AI micro-SaaS tools. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight, you can transform complex requirements into production-ready codebases in hours, establishing instant authority and creating tangible proof of your engineering capabilities for potential investors.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the silent killer of the modern founder. You have the vision, the market insight, and the drive, but the 'no portfolio' stigma acts as a concrete wall between you and your first paying customers. Investors and clients don't care about your potential; they care about your shipping velocity.

We are shifting the paradigm today. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop writing boilerplate and start building high-leverage assets. This isn't about learning to code; it's about mastering the orchestration of AI to manifest your product vision before the competition even finishes their documentation.

steps.title: Architectural Foundation with Antigravity
steps.description: Define your SaaS architecture to ensure scalability. Antigravity helps structure the project so Claude Code can execute with maximum context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular, scalable SaaS architecture for a [Insert Niche] tool. Focus on clean separation of concerns, API-first design, and database schema efficiency.

steps.title: Scaffolding the Core Value Proposition
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the MVP features that solve the primary user pain point immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a detailed feature specification for the core MVP component. Include error handling, input validation, and expected API response structures.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement core authentication and user dashboard routing based on the provided spec'

steps.title: Integrating High-Performance Data Layers
steps.description: Ensure your app handles data efficiently. Claude Code excels at writing optimized ORM queries that keep your latency low.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a data access layer for PostgreSQL that handles concurrent writes and implements basic caching strategies for performance.

steps.title: Automated Testing & Quality Assurance
steps.description: A portfolio project without tests is just a script. Use Claude Code to build a robust testing suite that proves your engineering rigor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a comprehensive test plan covering unit tests for logic and integration tests for critical user paths.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'generate jest suites for all api routes and ensure 80% coverage'

steps.title: Deployment and Revenue Readiness
steps.description: Finalize your CI/CD pipeline so your project isn't just code on a disk, but a live, accessible SaaS product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a production-ready CI/CD pipeline script for Vercel/AWS that includes automated linting and deployment checks.

pro_tips: Never accept the first output; use Antigravity to iterate on the prompt until the logic is 30% more efficient than standard boilerplate.
Inject your 'Founder Narrative' into the Claude system prompt to ensure the code reflects your specific brand voice and technical philosophy.
Always build for the '10x user'—if your code handles edge cases gracefully, it looks like you have years of experience, regardless of your actual commit history.
Use Claude Code to document your build process in real-time; this documentation becomes the 'case study' content for your portfolio site.
Prioritize 'Revenue-First' features in your code—if the code doesn't directly contribute to the user's ability to pay you, refactor it out.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, link your GitHub repository to your personal portfolio site, write a 300-word case study on the problem you solved, and share it on LinkedIn to attract your first design partners.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a founder. Leverage these tools to build, ship, and monetize your vision today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
